message:
docs(integration-guide): regenerate typed-client table from RobotCommands dispatch (ft-4ackg)

The "Available Data Types" table in docs/integration-guide.md was frozen
at an earlier CLI surface. Walking the RobotCommands enum in
crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs showed nine command families that were
shipping but undocumented for typed-client consumers:

* robot state / state --include-text  → StateWithTextData / Vec<PaneStateData>
* robot get-text --panes / --all      → BatchGetTextData
* robot search-explain                → SearchExplainData
* robot search-index {stats,status,metrics,reindex}
                                      → SearchIndexStatsData, SearchPipelineStatusData,
                                        SearchMetricsData, SearchIndexReindexData
* robot evaluate-anomaly              → serde_json::Value (untyped)
* robot workflow status --all / --detail
                                      → WorkflowStatusListData, WorkflowStatusDetailData
* robot mission {state,assign,unassign,decide,decisions}
                                      → MissionStateData, MissionAssignmentData,
                                        MissionDecisionData, MissionDecisionsData
* robot tx {plan,run,resume,rollback,show}
                                      → TxPlanData, TxRunData, TxResumeData,
                                        TxRollbackData, TxShowData
* robot agents {list,show,configure}  → AgentInventoryData, AgentConfigureData,
                                        AgentConfigureDryRunData
* robot health                        → HealthDiagnosticsData
* robot cass {search,view,status}     → CassSearchResult, CassViewResult, CassStatus
                                        (in frankenterm_core::cass, not robot_types)

Reorganized into topical subsections so the surface is easier to scan.
Called out NTM-gap families (handled separately by AGENTS.md
"Not Yet Implemented") and the one intentionally-untyped endpoint
(evaluate-anomaly → serde_json::Value).

Docs-only: no code changes.

files.patch:
@@ -118,35 +118,126 @@ if resp.ok {
 
 ## Available Data Types
 
-Each robot command has a corresponding typed struct:
+Each `ft robot <command>` dispatch returns either a named typed struct in
+`frankenterm_core::robot_types` or an untyped `serde_json::Value`. The
+table below is regenerated by walking the `RobotCommands` enum in
+`crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs`; NTM-gap families (checkpoint / context /
+work / fleet / profile — see AGENTS.md "Not Yet Implemented") return the
+`robot.not_implemented` envelope and are intentionally omitted here.
+
+### Pane state
 
 | Command | Type | Description |
 |---------|------|-------------|
+| `robot state` | `StateWithTextData` | Pane metadata; `--include-text` attaches tail text per pane |
+| `robot state` (array mode) | `Vec<PaneStateData>` | Bare per-pane rows emitted when `--include-text` is off |
 | `robot get-text` | `GetTextData` | Pane text with truncation info |
+| `robot get-text --panes / --all` | `BatchGetTextData` | Batched tail reads keyed by pane_id |
+
+### Interaction
+
+| Command | Type | Description |
+|---------|------|-------------|
 | `robot send` | `SendData` | Injection result with policy decision |
 | `robot wait-for` | `WaitForData` | Pattern match polling result |
-| `robot search` | `SearchData` | Lexical/semantic/hybrid search results with mode-aware scores |
+| `robot approve` | `ApproveData` | Approval validation |
+
+### Search
+
+| Command | Type | Description |
+|---------|------|-------------|
+| `robot search` | `SearchData` | Lexical/semantic/hybrid results with mode-aware scores |
+| `robot search-explain` | `SearchExplainData` | Plan + lint + mode selection trace for a query |
+| `robot search-index stats` | `SearchIndexStatsData` | Per-index row counts and size snapshots |
+| `robot search-index status` | `SearchPipelineStatusData` | Pipeline-level operational state (pause, rebuild, tier health) |
+| `robot search-index metrics` | `SearchMetricsData` | Counter/latency snapshot for the search pipeline |
+| `robot search-index reindex` | `SearchIndexReindexData` | Reindex job submission result |
+| `robot evaluate-anomaly` | `serde_json::Value` (untyped) | Semantic-anomaly detector dump; no typed struct today |
+
+### Events & workflows
+
+| Command | Type | Description |
+|---------|------|-------------|
 | `robot events` | `EventsData` | Detected events with filters |
 | `robot events annotate/triage/label` | `EventMutationData` | Annotation mutation result |
 | `robot workflow run` | `WorkflowRunData` | Workflow execution start |
 | `robot workflow list` | `WorkflowListData` | Available workflows |
 | `robot workflow status` | `WorkflowStatusData` | Execution progress |
+| `robot workflow status --all` | `WorkflowStatusListData` | All known executions, one row per run |
+| `robot workflow status <id> --detail` | `WorkflowStatusDetailData` | Step-by-step log for a single execution |
 | `robot workflow abort` | `WorkflowAbortData` | Abort confirmation |
+
+### Rules & pattern tooling
+
+| Command | Type | Description |
+|---------|------|-------------|
 | `robot rules list` | `RulesListData` | Rule pack listing |
 | `robot rules test` | `RulesTestData` | Rule match testing |
 | `robot rules show` | `RuleDetailData` | Full rule details |
 | `robot rules lint` | `RulesLintData` | Lint results |
+
+### Missions
+
+| Command | Type | Description |
+|---------|------|-------------|
+| `robot mission state` | `MissionStateData` | Mission lifecycle snapshot (assignments, gates, cancel/retry counters) |
+| `robot mission assign/unassign` | `MissionAssignmentData` | Assignment mutation result |
+| `robot mission decide` | `MissionDecisionData` | Single decision-point write result |
+| `robot mission decisions` | `MissionDecisionsData` | Full decision log for a mission |
+
+### Transactions
+
+| Command | Type | Description |
+|---------|------|-------------|
+| `robot tx plan` | `TxPlanData` | Plan structure: steps, preconditions, risk, compensations |
+| `robot tx run` | `TxRunData` | Execution-start envelope with per-step records |
+| `robot tx resume` | `TxResumeData` | Resume-from-checkpoint envelope |
+| `robot tx rollback` | `TxRollbackData` | Rollback outcome with executed compensating actions |
+| `robot tx show` | `TxShowData` | Timeline + chain-verification view of a prior run |
+
+### Agents
+
+| Command | Type | Description |
+|---------|------|-------------|
+| `robot agents list / show` | `AgentInventoryData` | Registered agent inventory |
+| `robot agents configure` | `AgentConfigureData` | Configuration write result |
+| `robot agents configure --dry-run` | `AgentConfigureDryRunData` | Preview of a configure call without mutation |
+
+### Accounts & reservations
+
+| Command | Type | Description |
+|---------|------|-------------|
 | `robot accounts list` | `AccountsListData` | Account balances |
 | `robot accounts refresh` | `AccountsRefreshData` | Refresh result |
 | `robot reservations list` | `ReservationsListData` | Pane reservations |
 | `robot reservations reserve` | `ReserveData` | New reservation |
 | `robot reservations release` | `ReleaseData` | Release confirmation |
-| `robot approve` | `ApproveData` | Approval validation |
+
+### Health & coding-agent session store (cass)
+
+| Command | Type | Description |
+|---------|------|-------------|
+| `robot health` | `HealthDiagnosticsData` | Composite health report including `HealthLeakRiskData` + `Vec<HealthGuidance>` |
+| `robot cass search` | `frankenterm_core::cass::CassSearchResult` | Agent-session lexical search hits |
+| `robot cass view` | `frankenterm_core::cass::CassViewResult` | Session-line context view |
+| `robot cass status` | `frankenterm_core::cass::CassStatus` | cass daemon status + index metadata |
+
+### Discovery & error codes
+
+| Command | Type | Description |
+|---------|------|-------------|
 | `robot why` | `WhyData` | Error code explanation |
 | `robot help` | `QuickStartData` | Quick-start guide |
 
-All types derive `Serialize` + `Deserialize` and use `#[serde(default)]`
-for optional fields, so they tolerate missing fields from older ft versions.
+All types in `frankenterm_core::robot_types` derive `Serialize` +
+`Deserialize` and use `#[serde(default)]` for optional fields, so they
+tolerate missing fields from older ft versions. The cass types
+(`CassSearchResult`, `CassViewResult`, `CassStatus`) live in
+`frankenterm_core::cass` for the same reason the cass CLI client lives
+there — they track the cass daemon's wire contract, not the robot
+envelope. `EvaluateAnomaly` is intentionally untyped today; treat its
+`data` field as a `serde_json::Value` and use `parse_response_untyped`
+for it.
 
 ### Search mode fields
